name: Cistern Sluice Gate
description: A mossy stone-and-wood gate controlling the outlet from the old cistern.
practicalPurpose: Regulates water entering the sturdy canal.
playerReadableClue: Old water stains mark safe and dangerous flow heights.
usefulBehavior: Allows gentle controlled flow into the canal.
dangerousBehavior: Opening fully releases too much water and causes downstream over-success failures.

name: Hidden Hill Drain
description: A half-buried stone-lined drain near the hill-built wall of Granny's house.
practicalPurpose: Unknown; likely part of older drainage infrastructure.
playerReadableClue: A damp patch, hollow sound, and fitted plug stone suggest a buried conduit.
usefulBehavior: Can remove ponded water from a dangerous surface area.
dangerousBehavior: May route water directly toward or under the basement.
mapPlacement: Near north or west house wall.
